subcodes.first_line: Thou hast attained unto the meeting and drunk the choice wine of reunion from the hand of grace and bounty. The Wronged One beseecheth God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فزت باللقاء و شربت رحیق الوصال من ید الفضل و العطاء ان المظلوم یسئل الله
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
